items.author: Run It Back on FanDuel TV
items.body_excerpt: On June 10, 2026 episode of 'Run It Back' on FanDuel TV, co-hosts Michelle Beadle, Boogie Cousins, Chandler Parsons, and Lou Williams react to the latest in NBA news & headlines! They are joined by Bucks forward Bobby Portis. And talk about being included in the recent Giannis…

items.title: Jeff Teague REFLECTS on Damian Lillard GOING OFF in Trail Blazers playoff WIN over Jokic & Nuggets
items.author: Club 520 Podcast
items.body_excerpt: Jeff Teague, DJ Wells, and B Hen reflect on Damian Lillard’s 55-point game for the Portland Trail Blazers in their 2 OT playoff win over Nikola Jokic and the Denver Nuggets in the NBA Playoffs. The guys talk about how prime Dame was one of the best players in NBA history, and…

items.title: Hollander POTD Donald Royal. Notre Dame SF was drafted 52nd in 87 but bounced around til he stuck w/ORL in 92. Was starter for 94-95 Finals team (DScott came off bench). Drew fouls well but not a great shooter. Cancer scare ended his career in 98 but he is healthy now.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Donald Royal. Notre Dame SF was drafted 52nd in 87 but bounced around til he stuck w/ORL in 92. Was starter for 94-95 Finals team (DScott came off bench). Drew fouls well but not a great shooter. Cancer scare ended his career in 98 but he is healthy now.
